Comments: Most ParamTyp values are carried in the generic ParameterV40 extension on ChargeItem. Some values are instead mapped to dedicated FHIR elements: BMI -> ChargeItem.supportingInformation, Billable -> ChargeItem.status, Amount -> ChargeItem.priceOverride.value, SLIndicationCode -> the CH Core indication-code extension. See the ParamTyp code system and the ParameterV40 Concept Map.
